orchestrator.owns: objective checks, check-ins, the OKR board, and subagent steering until the objective metric reaches target (operational_gate_pass_count == 10 of 10) or a human/blocking flag stops the loop
orchestrator.notes: codex xhigh progression workers implement via worker prompt packets; claude reviews line-by-line and runs gates; user ratifies frame and merges

dkrs.scope: traced() design residuals: ExecFnOptions tags support confirmed in types; remaining: execStream variant scope (staged or now), member-handle type spelling, lint exemption shape
core teardown semantics: in-flight exec during dispose never settles; child-ctx changes streams only end at dispose not at root close
dkrs.decision_target: fix-now in core vs record as candidate anti-goal + cooperative-stop pattern only
dkrs.budget: 1 probe, already partially characterized with repro evidence

dkrs.scope: OTel wiring shape: observable extension + otel.sink through scope; span export read method for G6 manifest
dkrs.decision_target: G6 gate read method + stage-2 packet content

ckrs.metric: G5: lite suite green with traced tests; example store call sites carry zero ctx.exec ceremony
ckrs.balance: discovery: D1 residuals; delivery: PKR-1 then PKR-3

ckrs.statement: durable pg/drizzle store with atomic aggregates and recovery
ckrs.balance: discovery: none open (schema landed, failures diagnosed); delivery: PKR-2..4

pkrs.assignment: lite traced(): marker + resolution arm producing handle-shaped members over fn-exec, identity types, tests, docs; lint no-unattributed-await exemption for traced deps
pkrs.progress_signals: handback on any core semantic surprise; lint 0; lite suite count

pkrs.assignment: store.ts rebuilt on traced queries atom with transactional aggregates; cooperative-stop shutdown (stopping atom, loop guards, main stop sequence)
pkrs.progress_signals: test suite green on pglite; no wedge in gated tests

pkrs.assignment: otel extension wiring + span manifest gate; daemon/server/cli entrypoints; compose docs
docs: example README+diagram, lite traced docs, lint docs, root alignment
codex adversarial review rounds until 0 open findings; PR; merge on green

promotion_rule: Candidate CKRs and candidate PKRs are not promoted until the orchestrator accepts the supporting DKR learning checkpoint.
handback_rule: PKRs hand back on unknown discovery instead of researching or resolving unknowns inside execution.
